relationships.context: Core architecture principle for Careerspan's hiring model
Key feature enabling zero time-to-hire for vetted archetypes
Focus area for maintaining persistent candidate relationships
Replaces transactional model by decoupling timing constraints
Temporal luck is the core limitation of transactional hiring
Both represent shift from inventory events to liquid asset management
Required pivot from databases of records to relationship-based model
Dormant matches enable passive matching by maintaining latent signals
